name: Bern Nix
abstract: Bern Nix (September 21, 1947 – May 31, 2017) was an American jazz guitarist. He recorded and performed with Ornette Coleman from 1975 to 1987 in Coleman's Prime Time band.

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Newport Jazz Festival: Ornette Coleman and Prime Time/ Cecil Taylor Unit

about_quotes.speaker: Lisa Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: actually no, it’s a co-led album with Jamaaladeen Tacuma, Roland Shannon Jackson, Ornette, and Bern Nix on guitar? No, I’m sorry, James Blood Ulmer on guitar.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lisa Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 22, 2021
